recommendations.title: Update Investor ESG Pitch Deck by 2026-06-30
recommendations.description: Revise investor pitch materials to highlight EU market entry, green bond issuance plans, and enhanced ESG disclosures to capture valuation premium and attract sustainability-focused funds.
recommendations.profitability_link: 5-10% P/E multiple uplift translating to ₹150-200 Cr market cap increase
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's ESG-driven P/E rerating from 12x to 18x

audit_trail.value: Need to mitigate revenue risk and highlight growth strategy
Investor communication and ESG disclosure linked to valuation premium
ESG narrative drove P/E rerating and improved investor sentiment

recommendations.title: Launch EU Market Entry to Capture ₹97.3 Cr Revenue
recommendations.description: Accelerate entry into the EU solar market to recapture ₹97.3 Cr green revenue at risk due to US anti-dumping duties, leveraging EU Taxonomy-aligned activities for green financing benefits.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹97.3 Cr revenue uplift FY27 from EU market entry
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's renewable portfolio expansion and green bond issuance

audit_trail.value: Top opportunity to recapture ₹97.3 Cr green revenue from EU/Asia markets
Aligned activities unlock green financing and lower cost of capital
Committed to 80% renewable portfolio, leading to P/E rerating and ₹5000 Cr green bond

recommendations.title: Issue ₹500 Cr Green Bond by 2026-09-30
recommendations.description: Raise ₹500 Cr via green bond issuance to fund EU/Asia market expansion and capex for diversification, capturing a 40 bps coupon saving and enhancing ESG profile for valuation premium.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹10 Cr annual interest cost saving at 40 bps coupon vs conventional debt
recommendations.peer_benchmark: ReNew Energy Global 2022 Green Bond ₹3200 Cr oversubscription

audit_trail.value: ₹3200 Cr green bond oversubscribed at 4.5% coupon, 40 bps cheaper than fossil debt

audit_trail.ref: Revenue risk mitigation via capital deployment
audit_trail.value: ₹604.3 Cr revenue at risk from US duties, need for diversification capex
CDP A-list inclusion linked to premium valuation and green financing access

recommendations.title: Implement SBTi-aligned Annual Emission Scorecard by 2026-12-31
recommendations.description: Develop and publish an annual SBTi-aligned GHG emission scorecard to track progress on Scope 1 and 2 reductions, enhancing transparency and supporting CDP A-list inclusion for premium valuation.
recommendations.profitability_link: 5-8% valuation premium from improved ESG ratings and FII inflows
recommendations.peer_benchmark: UPL Ltd 2024 CBAM disclosure and emission reduction programme

audit_trail.value: Disclosure drives FII inflows and P/E multiple expansion
Emission disclosure and reduction programme accelerated capex and improved ESG ratings
Need to track emission caps and carbon price exposure
